label: RP Core Nodes
description: Roleplay nodes for worldbook recall, memory recall, character cards, scene state, dialogue generation, and continuity checks.
author: Agent Workflow Platform

nodes.label: RP Input Parser
nodes.description: Parse raw player input into structured speech, action, intent, emotion, entities, and triggers.

descriptionI18n.zh: 将玩家原始输入解析为结构化的发言、动作、意图、情绪、实体和触发词。
descriptionI18n.en: Parse raw player input into structured speech, action, intent, emotion, entities, and triggers.

nodes.preview: Outputs parsed JSON with speech, action, intent, emotion, entities, and triggers.

previewI18n.zh: 输出包含 speech、action、intent、emotion、entities 和 triggers 的解析 JSON。
previewI18n.en: Outputs parsed JSON with speech, action, intent, emotion, entities, and triggers.

defaultConfig.parseRules: 分析玩家输入，提取：发言内容、角色动作、玩家意图、情绪标签、提到的实体名称、潜在触发词。输出JSON。

nodes.label: RP Context Assembler
nodes.description: Assemble character, scene, worldbook, memory, and parsed input into a structured RP context.

descriptionI18n.zh: 将角色卡、场景、世界书、记忆和解析后的玩家输入组装成结构化 RP 上下文。
descriptionI18n.en: Assemble character card, scene state, worldbook hits, memory recall, and parsed input into structured RP context.

nodes.preview: Outputs assembled RP context string from all upstream sources.

previewI18n.zh: 输出来自所有上游来源的组装 RP 上下文字符串。
previewI18n.en: Outputs assembled RP context string from all upstream sources.

nodes.label: Worldbook Search
nodes.description: Search worldbook entries and return canon context.

descriptionI18n.zh: 检索世界书条目，返回设定、角色、地点与规则上下文。
descriptionI18n.en: Search worldbook entries and return setting, character, location, and rule context.

nodes.preview: Returns matched worldbook entries and hit metadata.

previewI18n.zh: 返回匹配的世界书条目和命中元数据。
previewI18n.en: Returns matched worldbook entries and hit metadata.

nodes.label: Memory Recall
nodes.description: Recall long-term roleplay memories relevant to the current user input.

descriptionI18n.zh: 召回与当前玩家输入相关的长期角色扮演记忆。
descriptionI18n.en: Recall long-term roleplay memories relevant to the current user input.

nodes.preview: Returns matched relationship state, preferences, and unresolved hooks.

previewI18n.zh: 返回匹配的关系状态、偏好和未解决的伏笔。
previewI18n.en: Returns matched relationship state, preferences, and unresolved hooks.

nodes.label: RP Character Card
nodes.description: Define an NPC persona, voice, and boundaries.

descriptionI18n.zh: 定义 NPC 角色的人设、口吻和边界。
descriptionI18n.en: Define an NPC persona, voice, and boundaries.

nodes.preview: Outputs a structured character profile for roleplay generation.

previewI18n.zh: 输出用于角色扮演生成的结构化角色档案。
previewI18n.en: Outputs a structured character profile for roleplay generation.

defaultConfig.name: 璃夏
defaultConfig.persona: 冷静、敏锐，习惯用克制的语气试探对方。
defaultConfig.voice: 短句，含蓄，偶尔带一点锋利的幽默。
defaultConfig.boundaries: 不替玩家做决定，不直接揭开核心秘密。

nodes.label: RP Scene State
nodes.description: Collect location, mood, stakes, setup, and lore into a scene state.

descriptionI18n.zh: 将地点、氛围、风险、开局设定和背景设定收集为场景状态。
descriptionI18n.en: Collect location, mood, stakes, setup, and lore into a scene state.

nodes.preview: Outputs structured scene state for the dialogue director.

previewI18n.zh: 输出供对话导演使用的结构化场景状态。
previewI18n.en: Outputs structured scene state for the dialogue director.

defaultConfig.stakes: 玩家正在追查一本会改写记忆的书。

nodes.label: RP Dialogue Director
nodes.description: Generate an in-character roleplay reply from player input, character, scene, lore, and memory.

descriptionI18n.zh: 从玩家输入、角色卡、场景、设定和记忆中生成角色扮演回复。
descriptionI18n.en: Generate an in-character roleplay reply from player input, character, scene, lore, and memory.

nodes.preview: Outputs an RP reply while preserving player agency.

previewI18n.zh: 在保留玩家自主权的同时输出角色扮演回复。
previewI18n.en: Outputs an RP reply while preserving player agency.

defaultConfig.replyRules: 写中文。保留悬念。不要替玩家说话或行动。

nodes.label: RP Continuity Check
nodes.description: Check persona, canon, relationship continuity, and player agency.

descriptionI18n.zh: 检查角色人设、正典设定、关系连续性和玩家自主权。
descriptionI18n.en: Check persona, canon, relationship continuity, and player agency.

nodes.preview: Outputs continuity notes for the generated RP reply.

previewI18n.zh: 输出针对已生成 RP 回复的连续性检查笔记。
previewI18n.en: Outputs continuity notes for the generated RP reply.

nodes.label: RP Memory Write
nodes.description: Analyze the turn and generate memory write candidates for relationship changes, preferences, promises, lore, and hooks.

descriptionI18n.zh: 分析本轮对话，生成记忆写入候选：关系变化、偏好、承诺、设定揭示、未解决伏笔。
descriptionI18n.en: Analyze this turn and generate memory write candidates for relationship changes, preferences, promises, lore reveals, and unresolved hooks.

nodes.preview: Outputs memory candidate JSON array with type, title, content, tags, and priority.

previewI18n.zh: 输出包含类型、标题、内容、标签和优先级的记忆候选 JSON 数组。
previewI18n.en: Outputs memory candidate JSON array with type, title, content, tags, and priority.
